description_long: This is a compact, retro-style refrigerator with a teal blue exterior and a slightly textured, matte finish. The front features two separate doors, each with a metallic, horizontally oriented handle, and a playful set of colorful magnets shaped like letters and animals on the lower door. The top left of the upper door displays a small, rectangular metallic badge with a pattern of four white stars. The right side is plain, while the left side is also unadorned. The back of the refrigerator has a prominent, coiled metallic condenser tube, typical of older refrigerator models. The overall form is boxy with softly rounded edges, and the appliance appears sturdy and functional for urban or domestic use.
description: A compact, teal retro refrigerator with two doors, metallic handles, playful magnets, and a coiled condenser on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors with metallic handles, a star-patterned badge, and colorful magnets on the lower door.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain teal surface and the profile of the protruding doors and handles.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the coiled metallic condenser tube against the plain teal back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the unadorned teal surface and the door profiles.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding, horizontal metallic handles located on the right edge of each door.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Coiled metallic tube on the back panel.
